chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Divorce of a Woman Who Has Not Been Consummated and the Ruling on a Woman Whose Husband Passes Away Before or After Consummation

text: 4779 - وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ: "يَأْخُذُ بَعْضاً وَ يَدَعُ بَعْضاً وَ لَيْسَ لَهُ أَنْ يَدَعَ كُلَّهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4779 - And in another narration:
"He may take a part and leave a part, but he does not have the right to forgo all of it."
